name: Beef and Mushroom Stroganoff
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons Pillsbury BEST All Purpose Flour
3/4 lb beef tenderloin or boneless sirloin steak, cut into 1/2" cubes
1 8 oz package sliced fresh mushrooms, about 3 cups
8 oz uncooked egg noodles, about 4 1/2 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish or plastic food storage bag, combine flour, salt, and pepper; mix well. Add beef; toss to coat. Remove beef from the bag; place on a plate.
2. In a small bowl, combine broth and remaining flour mixture from the bag; blend well. Set aside.
3. Spray a medium nonstick skillet with nonstick cooking spray. Add oil; heat over high heat until hot. Add beef; cook and stir 2 minutes.
4. Reduce heat to medium-high. Add onion; cook and stir 2 minutes. Add mushrooms; cook 4 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in broth mixture; bring to a boil. Reduce heat; simmer for 5 minutes to blend flavors. Remove skillet from heat; stir in sour cream.
5. Pour the mixture into a freezer container; cover tightly. Refrigerate until completely cooled. Store in the freezer until ready to use.
6. To serve, cook noodles to desired doneness as directed on the package. Drain; cover to keep warm.
7. Meanwhile, thaw and heat the beef mixture by placing it in a microwave-safe dish with vented plastic wrap. Microwave on HIGH for 5 minutes. Break the mixture into pieces with a spoon. Microwave on MEDIUM for an additional 6 to 9 minutes or until thoroughly heated, stirring once halfway through heating. Serve the beef mixture over noodles.
